title: Item validator + auto-grade self-test harness (CI)
context: The project's claim that banks are auto-gradable must be a tested property, not a claim. The validator must enforce schema validity, run the grader self-test (key→100%, every distractor→0, partial→defined value), and apply quality lints (distractor hygiene, answer-position balance, reading-level check, accessibility lint) in CI. Golden fixtures (synthetic items, never restricted source text) must back every check. This is the hardest engineering prerequisite for bank authoring: no bank can be certified done without this harness running green.
objective: Implement the item validator and auto-grade self-test harness that runs in CI, validating schema correctness, grader behavior, item quality, and accessibility for every item in a bank.
acceptanceCriteria: Validates every item against the JSON schema defined in quiz-bank-open-model-001.

Runs the grader self-test per the spec in quiz-bank-open-grader-002: published answer key scores 100%; every declared wrong answer (all distractors) scores 0; partial-credit items score the defined partial value for defined partial responses.
Quality lint checks: duplicate or implausible distractors flagged; answer-position balance checked; all/none-of-the-above hygiene enforced; reading-level check applied.
Accessibility lint checks: alt text present for all assets; no color-only cues; MathML/aria format for math items.
Ships golden fixtures (synthetic items only, never restricted source text): valid items that must pass all checks, and malformed/wrong-key items that must fail.
Code is MIT-licensed; pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm lint pass; commits are DCO signed-off.
output: A CI-integrated item validator and auto-grade self-test harness (MIT-licensed Node package) with golden fixtures, running in CI and gating all bank authoring tasks.
